title: Quick Qampa Red Sea Risks For Oil Gas And Tanker Markets
section_path: Quick Qampa Red Sea Risks For Oil Gas And Tanker Markets
section_path_text: Quick Qampa Red Sea Risks For Oil Gas And Tanker Markets
summary: Some of the largest companies in the oil and shipping industries are now adjusting operations to avoid transit through the Red Sea. As this situation evolves, it makes sense to understand just how these shifts could impact oil flows and tanker activity. In this quickfire Q&A, we highlight some of the key questions around the latest developments.

children.summary:
By Jay Maroo
How much cargo is transported by tankers via the Red Sea? How many tankers move along the route?
